scenarios.title: Insufficient distinct people
scenarios.synthetic_input: Slots A and B point to the same restricted assignment.
scenarios.expected_control: Block activation until three distinct people are verified.

scenarios.title: Candidate declines
scenarios.synthetic_input: A nominated person declines the role.
scenarios.expected_control: Keep the slot open and record no adverse consequence.

scenarios.title: Qualification gap
scenarios.synthetic_input: A candidate lacks the required safeguarding competence.
scenarios.expected_control: Do not activate the role; obtain training or another candidate.

scenarios.title: Material conflict
scenarios.synthetic_input: A candidate would review their own incident.
scenarios.expected_control: Require recusal and an independent reviewer.

scenarios.title: Protocol approval missing
scenarios.synthetic_input: Five of six CP2-applicable protocols are approved.

scenarios.title: Environment not verified
scenarios.synthetic_input: A local folder exists but access and deletion controls are untested.
scenarios.expected_control: Do not treat the environment as deployed.

scenarios.title: Private identity file staged in Git
scenarios.synthetic_input: A restricted identity record appears in the Git index.
scenarios.expected_control: Stop, remove from index and history as needed, and review exposure.

scenarios.title: Main advanced
scenarios.synthetic_input: origin/main changes after the pre-authorization package was prepared.
scenarios.expected_control: Stop and re-audit numbering and changed files.

scenarios.title: Scope expands to affected-person evidence
scenarios.synthetic_input: The rehearsal proposes a real family case.
scenarios.expected_control: Block CP2 and require CP3 governance.

scenarios.title: Real sensitive disclosure during staff rehearsal
scenarios.synthetic_input: A staff member begins disclosing a real current crisis.
scenarios.expected_control: Stop evidence capture and use the safeguarding route.

scenarios.title: Activation decision absent
scenarios.synthetic_input: All preparatory checks pass but no separate activation decision exists.
scenarios.expected_control: Keep CP2 blocked and not executed.
